entries.title: New Discord members added to name pool
entries.summary: Added JJ, Freshboii, VidTu, DanMizu, and Varocraft25 to the Discord community name pool.
highlights: JJ, Freshboii, VidTu, DanMizu, and Varocraft25 can now appear as item name contributors

entries.title: New Discord member added to name pool
entries.summary: Added anuncommonguy to the Discord community name pool.
highlights: anuncommonguy can now appear as an item name contributor

entries.title: Now available for Minecraft 1.20.1
entries.summary: Adventure Item Names now runs on Minecraft 1.20.1 as well as 1.21.1 — the same procedural item names, provenance lore, themed packs, and in-game naming editor, just on the older version. Fabric and Forge are supported on 1.20.1; NeoForge remains 1.21.1.
highlights: New: Fabric and Forge builds for Minecraft 1.20.1
Same naming engine, lore, bundled themed packs, and in-game editor on both 1.21.1 and 1.20.1
Existing 1.21.1 builds (Fabric / Forge / NeoForge) are unchanged
